# grantory_schema_definitions (Data Source)
Use this data source to filter Grantory records inside a Terraform/OpenTofu plan.


## Schema

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `schema_definitions` (List of Object) Schema definitions returned by Grantory. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schema_definitions))

<a id="nestedatt--schema_definitions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schema_definitions`

Read-Only:

- `schema` (String)
- `schema_definition_id` (String)
